title: アルゼンチン共和国杯にむけて

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh, Jordan's race is starting soon!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: For real?! Fiiinally!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Real talk though, how often do we get a day off
together? And we get to spend it cheering our
lungs out! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Heck yeah! It's gonna be lit! Now take a deep
breath, feel it in your diaphragm, and...

text_block_list.name: Gyaru A
text_block_list.text: G-go Jordan! You... you got this!

text_block_list.name: Gyaru B
text_block_list.text:
Dude, she hasn't even come out yet! Oh god, look,
people are staring at us...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Are those Jordan's friends? Baby's first
cheer?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Heeey, this the Jordan cheer club? Mind if we
join?

text_block_list.name: Gyaru C
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Oh, um...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Only if you guys are cool with it. But if we're all
gonna cheer, might as well do it together so we're
louder, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I know cheering for the first time out here can be
daunting. Unlike back at school, there's a bunch
of adults around.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But you just gotta let all your feelings out! We all
want Jordan to win, don't we?

text_block_list.name: Gyaru D
text_block_list.text:
O-of course! We want her to win! We want her to
run full out!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that's the spirit! Let it all out! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: On three—one, two...

text_block_list.name: Gyarus
text_block_list.text: YOU CAN DO IT, JORDAAAN!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...I can't.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, since when were they friends with Helios?
Looks like they're having a lot of fun.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: "You can do it"? Pfft, no duh I can do it.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh gosh, now I really can't embarrass myself.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
A-OK. You made an appointment for after the
race, right? With that doctor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're planning to go the same hospital as before
for a follow-up appointment.
choice_data_list: Let's hope for good results with the race and the doctor.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Just you watch.
